rationale: The only direct evidence is a single DOI match (10.1509/jmkr.46.5.623) with no in-text citation context, so we cannot see how it is used in the 2010 paper. The two notes show plausible topical overlap (cross-country advertising and private-label dynamics), but the cited study is macro business-cycle focused while the citing study is consumer-level willingness-to-pay, so substantive dependence is unclear from current evidence.
